'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 19''' is the nineteenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 19 was published in Summer [[1993]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"Listening to Star Wars: The Original Radio Drama"
*"Walking in the Footsteps of a Wookie: Peter Mayhew"
*"Welcome to the George Lucas Exhibition"
*"David Prowse: The Man Behind the Mask"
